opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of the data validation layer will be the critical bottleneck. Think about drift – the underlying models used for anomaly detection will degrade over time, necessitating a retraining pipeline with careful attention to feature engineering and edge case handling to avoid false negatives. A layered approach to verification, with human-in-the-loop failover, is essential.
actions.reasoning: I’ve built agent systems that rely on external data streams and critical safety checks, so I can speak to the technical challenges of this project.
